summary: Testing Phase 5: Delete Batch (permanent) + Rebuild Variance (clean slate). All 9 backend tests PASSED, all 8 frontend UI verifications PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/portal/forward-batches/{batch_id} permanently removes batch and data from variance (NO inbox reset) - WORKING
POST /api/portal/rebuild-variance clears ALL synced_locations + conflict_locations, then rebuilds from sync_raw_logs - WORKING
Rebuild deduplicates per device per location (keeps latest synced_at) - WORKING
Rebuild detects conflicts when different devices scan same location - WORKING
Rebuild returns: cleared_locations, cleared_conflicts, rebuilt_locations, conflicts_created, raw_logs_processed - WORKING
Frontend Batches tab shows 'Delete Batch' button (not 'Rollback Batch') with data-testid='delete-batch-{id}' - WORKING
Frontend shows 'Rebuild Variance' button with data-testid='rebuild-variance-btn' - WORKING
Frontend shows info text: 'Re-push Raw Data to Variance', 'raw sync logs', 'source of truth' - WORKING
Delete batch uses window.confirm for confirmation dialog - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Created test sync data via POST /api/sync/ with TEST_DeletePerm_, TEST_Rebuild_, TEST_Dedup_, TEST_Dev1_, TEST_Dev2_, TEST_NoPending_, TEST_FullFlow_ prefixed devices and locations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 (Delete Batch + Rebuild Variance) testing complete. Key changes from previous iteration (11): 1) 'Rollback Batch' renamed to 'Delete Batch' - permanent deletion with no inbox reset, 2) New 'Rebuild Variance' endpoint clears all variance data then rebuilds from raw sync logs, 3) Rebuild includes deduplication per device per location and conflict detection. Test data uses Client=master-stock-config, Session=master-stock-config, Sync password=test123

test_classes: TestDeleteBatchPermanent (2 tests) - permanent deletion removes from variance, 404 for nonexistent
TestRebuildVariance (3 tests) - endpoint exists, clears and rebuilds, returns proper counts
TestRebuildDeduplication (1 test) - keeps latest per device per location
TestRebuildConflictDetection (1 test) - creates conflicts for different devices same location
TestDeleteBatchVsRollback (1 test) - delete does NOT reset inbox to pending

test_scenarios: 1_navigation: PASS - Navigate to Sync & Forward page via localStorage auth
2_client_session: PASS - Client and session filters work correctly
3_batches_tab: PASS - Batches tab accessible and clickable
4_delete_buttons: PASS - Found 15 'Delete Batch' buttons with data-testid
6_rebuild_button: PASS - 'Rebuild Variance' button found and visible
7_rebuild_text: PASS - 'Re-push Raw Data to Variance' info text present
8_source_truth: PASS - 'source of truth' text present in rebuild section

features_verified.backend_delete_batch_permanent: PASS - DELETE removes from variance without inbox reset
features_verified.backend_rebuild_counts: PASS - Returns all required counts in response
features_verified.backend_rebuild_dedup: PASS - Deduplicates per device per location
features_verified.backend_full_flow: PASS - Delete→Rebuild restores data from raw logs
features_verified.frontend_delete_button: PASS - 'Delete Batch' buttons with correct data-testid
features_verified.frontend_info_text: PASS - Explanatory text about re-push from raw data

screenshots: .screenshots/batches_tab_view.png - Shows Batches tab with Delete Batch buttons
.screenshots/final_batches_tab.png - Shows full batches list with Rebuild Variance section
